canonical_definition: A benchmark for evaluating conversational question answering and retrieval-augmented generation performance on short context tasks within a 4K token window.
papers: APE: Faster and Longer Context-Augmented Generation via Adaptive Parallel Encoding
ChatQA 2: Bridging the Gap to Proprietary LLMs in Long Context and RAG Capabilities

definitions.text: A benchmark for conversational retrieval-augmented generation evaluated on multi-turn question answering with retrieved text chunks.
